meta.title: Universal I/O — The universal interface for human intent
meta.description: Universal I/O turns messy communication, requests, and ideas into clear, safe, work-ready output — before they enter your tools. macOS first.

hero.title: The universal interface for human intent.
hero.subtitle: Universal I/O turns messy communication, requests, and ideas into clear, safe, work-ready output — before they enter your tools.
hero.platforms: macOS first · iOS · works where you type

examples.input: Honestly this is unacceptable. Fix it or I'm escalating.
examples.rewrite: This is blocking me and feels urgent — could we prioritize a fix today?

examples.input: Can you fix this today? We already talked about it.
examples.rewrite: Could you take a look today if possible?

examples.input: Someone should update the pricing page before Thursday's launch.
examples.rewrite: Task created — needs an owner before Thursday.

examples.input: As I already explained, this is NOT what we agreed on.
examples.rewrite: I think this differs from what we agreed — can we review it together?

examples.input: It might be nice to maybe revisit this at some point…
examples.rewrite: Please schedule a review of this decision this week.

problem.title: Work starts messy. Software expects clean.
problem.body: Every company runs on human input. Messages. Requests. Notes. Escalations. Tiny sentences with expensive consequences. But work systems expect structured, safe, complete information — and people do not write like databases. People write like people.

product.title: A small layer before every big workflow.
product.body: Universal I/O captures intent at the input moment and converts it into safer, clearer, more useful output.

cards.title: Rewrite with context
cards.body: Make messages clearer, calmer, and easier to act on.

cards.title: Extract intent
cards.body: Identify requests, facts, deadlines, owners, risks, and next actions.

cards.title: Route to tools
cards.body: Convert human input into tasks, notes, tickets, summaries, or system-ready data.

cards.title: Reduce communication risk
cards.body: Flag ambiguity, emotional escalation, legal sensitivity, or compliance issues.

cards.title: Preserve privacy
cards.body: Help the sender before the message becomes a team problem.

demo.title: From sentence to system.
demo.body: Universal I/O turns one messy input into multiple usable outputs.
demo.raw: “This is still broken. I thought we already fixed it. Please deal with it today.”
demo.out1: “Could you check this again today? It looks like the issue may still be unresolved.”

cards.title: Before a message becomes a bomb, make it useful.
Turn customer chaos into clean cases.
Handle sensitive words before they become sensitive incidents.

whyNow.title: The next interface is not another app. It is the layer between apps.
whyNow.body: AI is entering every workflow, but the input layer is still mostly human typing into boxes. Universal I/O turns that moment into an intelligent surface. Before the CRM. Before the ticket. Before the Slack message. Before the agent. Before the mistake.

principles.title: Built for humans. Useful for machines.

items.title: Human first
items.body: People should not have to speak like software.

items.title: Context-aware
items.body: The same sentence can mean different things in different teams, roles, and workflows.

items.title: Safety before surveillance
items.body: Help people at the point of input, rather than judging them after the fact.

items.title: Structured by default
items.body: Every useful output should be easier to route, search, log, or automate.

items.title: Lightweight by design
items.body: Universal I/O should feel like a keyboard, not another dashboard.

symbol.title: I//O is the product model.
symbol.body: The brand symbol represents the transformation from human intent to usable output.

input.title: Input
input.body: Input, intent, individual, idea. The moment a human starts typing.

translation.title: Translation
translation.body: Translation, review, safety, context, alignment. The intelligent layer in between.

output.title: Output
output.body: Output, outcome, organization, operation. Work-ready and safe to send.

trust.title: Not surveillance. A personal safety layer.
trust.body: Universal I/O is designed to help people before communication becomes organizational risk. It is not here to watch people. It is here to help them say what they actually mean.
trust.strong: Review at the edge. Share only what matters.
bullets: Works at the input moment — helps the sender first
Converts raw communication into abstracted, usable work data
Reduces unnecessary exposure of sensitive wording
Safer collaboration without turning people into dashboards
trust.rawText: “Honestly this whole thing is a disaster…”
trust.pill: Clean, structured output — only what matters

cta.title: Build the input layer for your team.
cta.body: Universal I/O is for teams that believe the future of work starts before the message is sent.
cta.witty: Bring us your messiest workflow. We like weird input.
cta.success: Thanks — you're on the list. We'll be in touch soon.
